title: Watch: What next after the King's Speech?
snippet: BBC Chief Political Correspondent Henry Zeffman explains what is next for the government after the King's Speech.

title: Gordon agrees to Bayern move - Thursday's gossip
snippet: Bayern Munich reach Anthony Gordon agreement, Ander Barrenetxea attracting Premier League interest and Manchester United prepare Elliot Anderson move.

title: 'Bingo! It's a match'- Franklin expedition sailor's DNA links to BBC reporter
snippet: Researchers at the University of Waterloo found remains of Rich Preston's great great great uncle John Bridgens.

title: Love Island star tells followers 'you are loved' as he shares mental health challenges
snippet: Alex George said he wanted to help reduce "shame and stigma" around mental health challenges.

title: Durham to Bedford - Gay's 200-mile drive to tell parents of England call-up
snippet: On the day he learned he would be England’s new opener, Emilio Gay drove from Durham to Bedford to tell his parents about his first international call-up.

title: James Van Der Beek's widow posts emotional tribute: 'Words just don't capture what grief is'
snippet: The Dawson's Creek actor died in February and his wife, Kimberly, says "the reality is settling in".

title: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact
snippet: The woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says.

title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 22 people, health ministry says
snippet: Eight children are among those reported dead after a series of air strikes hit the south of Beirut.

title: Streeting allies expect leadership challenge against Starmer
snippet: The health secretary's supporters tell the BBC he could launch a leadership bid as soon as Thursday.

title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
snippet: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.

title: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
snippet: A BBC investigation exposed how scammers posted social content of dogs in distress to dupe donors into giving money.

title: Sydney dentist's patients warned of viruses including HIV
snippet: Authorities urged patients to get tested due to "poor infection control practices" at the Australian clinic.

title: Is this actually what Anne Boleyn looked like?
snippet: An algorithm has suggested images of what were thought to be Anne Boleyn might not be.

title: Does England's defence put winning streak at risk?
snippet: Does England's leaky defence put their record winning streak at risk in Sunday's Grand Slam decider against France in Bordeaux?

title: Why Arsenal have fallen short in WSL and Champions League this season
snippet: Why have Renee Slegers' side not been able to get their hands on any of the season's biggest prizes?
